title: Viacha Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap has hit Viacha with a Z-Score of -4.23. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Viacha are extremely cold, with a high Z-Score indicating a significant deviation from normal temperatures.
The relative humidity is at 75%, with a gentle wind of 2.4 km/h, making the cold even more unbearable.
The heating degree days (HDD) are at 15.8 GG, while the cooling degree days (CDD) are at 0.0 GG, highlighting the severity of the cold snap.
conclusion: Activate emergency cold snap protocols immediately.
